name: case06_regex_job
description: Case 06: Regex log parsing - S3 text source with regex extraction to S3 gzip CSV
codeGenConfigurationNodes: {"node-1": {"S3CsvSource": {"AdditionalOptions": {"EnableSamplePath": false, "SamplePath": ""}, "Escaper": "\\", "Exclusions": [], "Name": "S3 Text Source - case06_regex", "OptimizePerformance": false, "OutputSchemas": [{"Columns": [{"Name": "col0", "Type": "string"}]}], "Paths": ["s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/preparing/case06_regex/"], "QuoteChar": "disabled", "Recurse": true, "Separator": "tab", "WithHeader": false}}, "node-2": {"SparkSQL": {"Inputs": ["node-1"], "Name": "SQL Query", "OutputSchemas": [{"Columns": []}], "SqlAliases": [{"Alias": "myDataSource", "From": "node-1"}], "SqlQuery": "SELECT TO_DATE(REGEXP_EXTRACT(col0, '([0-3][0-9]\\\\.[0-9][0-9]\\\\.[0-9]{4})', 1), 'dd.MM.yyyy') AS TRANS_DATE, REGEXP_EXTRACT(col0, '([0-2][0-9]:[0-5][0-9]:[0-5][0-9])', 1) AS TRANS_TIME, REGEXP_EXTRACT(col0, '\\\\[([0-9.]+)\\\\]', 1) AS IP_ADDRESS, REGEXP_EXTRACT(col0, '\\\\] (/[^ ]+)', 1) AS URL, REGEXP_EXTRACT(col0, '(\\\\d+) ms', 1) AS RESPONSE_TIME, REGEXP_EXTRACT(col0, 'P: ([^ ]+)', 1) AS USER_ID, REGEXP_EXTRACT(col0, 'CID IN \\\\(([^)]+)\\\\)', 1) AS CID, REGEXP_EXTRACT(col0, 'ACN = ([0-9]+)', 1) AS CIF, CASE WHEN col0 LIKE '%ERROR%' OR col0 LIKE '%java%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS ERROR_FLAG, col0 AS LOG_TXT, TO_DATE('20260408', 'yyyyMMdd') AS VERSION_DATE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS ETL_UPDATE_DATE FROM myDataSource WHERE LENGTH(TRIM(col0)) > 0 AND (col0 LIKE '%SELECT CID, ODACN FROM DEPODP WHERE CID IN%' OR col0 LIKE '%WHERE CIF.ACN =%')"}}, "node-3": {"S3DirectTarget": {"AutoDataQuality": {"IsEnabled": false}, "Compression": "gzip", "Format": "csv", "Inputs": ["node-2"], "Name": "S3 Gzip CSV Target - case06_regex", "NumberTargetPartitions": "0", "PartitionKeys": [], "Path": "s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/staging/case06_regex/load/", "SchemaChangePolicy": {"EnableUpdateCatalog": false}}}}
